S: 35-year-old patient. Sore throat and fatigue since this morning. Mild headache. No chest pain, shortness of breath, or red-flag symptoms reported. Symptom duration today. Requesting 1-day work certificate. O: Telehealth consultation. No physical examination. A: Symptoms consistent with self-limiting acute illness based on structured intake. P: 1-day medical certificate issued from 2026-05-28. Symptomatic management advised (rest, fluids, paracetamol PRN). Return if symptoms persist beyond 7 days, or develop high fever (>39 C), shortness of breath, chest pain, or inability to keep fluids down. Issue sign-off: Dr Amelia Reid · MED0001234567 Saved as you type. Private until you send.
